arts.ttl: Norwich winger Borja Sainz gets 6-game ban for spitting at opponent
arts.sum: Norwich winger Borja Sainz was banned for six matches Friday after admitting that he spit at an opponent during a game in December. Sainz, who was also fined 12,000 pounds ($14,800), spit at Sunderland defender Chris Mepham in the second half of Norwich’s 2-1 loss at the Stadium of Light on Dec. 21.

arts.ttl: Norwich's Sainz gets FA ban for spitting at player
arts.sum: Norwich City top scorer Borja Sainz has been handed a six-game ban after admitting to spitting at an opponent, the Football Association confirmed on Friday.

arts.ttl: Norwich winger Sainz banned for six games after spitting incident
arts.sum: Norwich winger Borja Sainz has been banned for six matches and fined £12,000 for a spitting incident during last month's Championship defeat at Sunderland.

arts.ttl: Norwich's Sainz banned for six matches for spitting
arts.sum: Norwich City's top scorer Borja Sainz is suspended for six matches after admitting to spitting at Sunderland's Chris Mepham in December.

arts.ttl: Brighton asking price for player making transfer ‘complex’ – Huge offer need to convince Seagulls
arts.sum: Earlier this week, Atalanta were linked with a move for Brighton & Hove Albion youngster Julio Enciso. Tuttomercatoweb reported the Italian side had already made an offer for the Paraguayan, putting forward an initial loan with an option to buy move. More updates have emerged from Italy about the 20-year-old.
